modules.module_title: Introduction to Event Catering & Client Management

questions.question: Event catering mein 'BEO' ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Business Event Outline

questions.explanation: BEO (Banquet Event Order) ek document hai jisme event ki saari details hoti hain, jaise menu, schedule, setup requirements, aur client information.

questions.question: Client se first meeting ka sabse important objective kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Client ki vision aur requirements ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Pehli meeting ka mukhya uddeshya client ki zarooraton aur unke event ke vision ko aache se samajhna hota hai taaki unke anusaar service di ja sake.

questions.question: Ek corporate event ka catering, wedding catering se kaise alag hota hai?

options.A: Corporate events mein hamesha buffet hota hai
options.B: Wedding catering mein zyada variety aur customization hota hai
options.C: Corporate events mein sirf snacks serve kiye jaate hain
options.D: Dono mein koi fark nahi hota

questions.explanation: Aam taur par, wedding catering mein guest preferences, traditions aur themes ke hisaab se zyada food variety aur customization ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar koi client event se theek pehle menu mein bada badlav karne ko kahe, to aapka pehla kadam kya hoga?

options.B: Extra charges ke baare mein inform karna aur feasibility check karna
options.C: Bina kuch kahe change kar dena

questions.explanation: Professional tareeka hai ki client ko extra cost aur is badlav ko implement karne ki possibility (feasibility) ke baare mein bataya jaaye.

questions.question: On-site catering aur Off-site catering mein kya mool antar hai?

options.A: On-site mein khana venue par banta hai, Off-site mein kitchen se laaya jaata hai
options.B: On-site sasta hota hai
options.C: Off-site sirf chhote events ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: On-site catering ka matlab hai khana event venue par hi taiyaar karna. Off-site catering mein khana central kitchen mein banakar venue par transport kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek client ne food quality ki complaint ki hai. Aapka immediate response kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Complaint ko ignore karna
options.C: Mafi maangna aur turant solution offer karna (jaise dish replace karna)
options.D: Discount ke liye baad mein baat karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Customer service mein, sabse pehle client ki baat sunkar, maafi maangni chahiye aur turant samasya ka samadhan karna chahiye, jaise ki dish ko replace karna.

questions.question: Venue recce (site visit) karte waqt ek caterer ko kya check karna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Parking space kitni hai
options.C: Kitchen space, water supply, aur power points ki availability
options.D: AC aache se kaam kar raha hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Caterer ke liye venue recce ka mukhya uddeshya operational feasibility check karna hota hai, jiske liye kitchen area, paani aur bijli ki suvidha sabse mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Ek high-profile VIP event ke liye catering contract final karte waqt, kis clause par sabse zyada dhyan dena chahiye?

options.B: Cancellation policy

questions.explanation: High-profile events mein client ki privacy aur event ki details ko gupt rakhna bahut zaroori hota hai. Isliye, confidentiality clause par aache se dhyan dena chahiye.

questions.question: Client ke saath 'Tasting Session' arrange karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Extra paise charge karne ka mauka milta hai
options.B: Client ka trust jeetna aur menu final karne mein madad milti hai
options.C: Staff ko practice ho jaati hai

questions.explanation: Tasting session se client ko food quality aur taste ka anubhav milta hai, jisse unka vishwas badhta hai aur menu ko अंतिम roop dene mein aasani hoti hai.

questions.question: Social event jaise birthday party aur corporate event jaise conference ke beech catering style mein mukhya antar kya hota hai?

options.A: Social events mein live counters aur interactive food stations zyada pasand kiye jaate hain
options.B: Corporate events mein khana serve nahi hota
options.C: Social events mein sirf vegetarian khana hota hai

questions.explanation: Social events ka mahaul anopcharik (informal) hota hai, isliye wahan guests ko engage karne ke liye live counters (jaise pasta, dosa) zyada lokpriya hote hain.

questions.question: Ek naye client ko attract karne ke liye sabse prabhavi marketing tool kya hai?

options.B: Apne pichle events ki high-quality photos aur client testimonials dikhana

questions.explanation: Visuals aur social proof (testimonials) naye clients par sabse zyada asar daalte hain. Yeh aapki quality aur credibility ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Event ke baad client se feedback lena kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf good comments collect karne ke liye
options.B: Apni service ko behtar banane aur future business ke liye relationship build karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Feedback se aapko apni kamiyon ka pata chalta hai jise aap sudhaar sakte hain, aur positive feedback se client ke saath ek majboot rishta banta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek client ka budget bahut kam hai, to aap use kya salah denge?

options.A: Kaam karne se mana kar denge
options.B: Menu mein cost-effective options suggest karenge jaise buffet-style service ya seasonal vegetables ka istemal
options.D: Apne staff ki salary kam kar denge

questions.explanation: Ek achhe caterer ko client ke budget mein fit hone wale solutions dene chahiye, jaise ki mehengi plated service ki jagah buffet ya mehengi samagri ki jagah sasti, seasonal samagri ka upyog.

questions.question: Event industry mein 'RFP' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Ready For Party

questions.explanation: RFP (Request For Proposal) ek formal document hota hai jo client (khaas kar corporate) caterers ko bhejta hai, jismein woh apne event ke liye quotation aur proposal maangta hai.

questions.question: Client communication ke liye kaun sa tarika sabse professional maana jaata hai?

options.B: Phone calls
options.C: Emails for important details and written records

questions.explanation: Email ek professional tarika hai jisse saari baatein likhit roop mein rehti hain, jisse future mein kisi bhi tarah ke confusion se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek outdoor event (jaise garden wedding) ke liye catering plan karte waqt sabse bada challenge kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Music system ka na hona
options.C: Mausam mein achanak badlav (baarish, tez hawa)

questions.explanation: Outdoor events mein mausam ek bada anishchit factor hota hai. Caterer ko hamesha ek contingency plan (Plan B) taiyaar rakhna chahiye, jaise ki waterproof tents.

questions.question: Client ke saath contract sign karne se pehle, usmein kya-kya cheezein saaf-saaf likhi honi chahiye?

options.B: Menu, price, date, time, guest count, payment schedule, aur cancellation policy
options.C: Sirf caterer ka naam aur address
options.D: Sirf client ka naam aur phone number

questions.explanation: Ek complete contract mein event ki har choti-badi detail, payment terms, aur cancellation policy saaf-saaf likhi honi chahiye taaki dono parties ke liye clarity rahe.

questions.question: Menu planning ka pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Client ke budget, theme, aur guest profile ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Ek safal menu banane ke liye sabse pehle client ke budget, event ki theme, aur aane wale guests (jaise unki age, preferences) ko samajhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek balanced menu mein kya-kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Appetizers, main course, desserts, aur beverages ka sahi mishran

questions.explanation: Ek balanced menu mein shuruaat (appetizers), mukhya bhojan (main course), meetha (desserts) aur pey padarth (beverages) ka sahi santulan hona chahiye.

questions.question: Agar guests mein Jain, Vegan, aur Gluten-free dietary restrictions wale log hain, to caterer ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe khana na khane ki salah deni chahiye
options.B: Menu mein sabhi ke liye special options shamil karne chahiye aur unhe aache se label karna chahiye
options.D: Client ko extra charge karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Ek professional caterer ko sabhi guests ki dietary zarooraton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye. Iske liye menu mein alag-alag options provide karna aur unhe saaf-saaf label karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Portion control catering mein kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Food cost control karne aur wastage kam karne ke liye
options.B: Guests ko kam khana dene ke liye
options.C: Khana jaldi khatam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Portion control se yah sunishchit hota hai ki har guest ko paryapt matra mein khana mile aur saath hi food wastage aur cost bhi control mein rahe.

questions.question: Seasonal ingredients istemal karne ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.B: Yeh aasani se nahi milte
options.C: Yeh fresh, saste, aur unka taste behtar hota hai

questions.explanation: Mausami (seasonal) samagri taazi, aasani se uplabdh aur sasti hoti hai, jisse khane ka swaad aur quality dono behtar hote hain.

questions.question: Food presentation mein 'garnish' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Dish ka price badhane ke liye
options.B: Dish ko aakarshak (visually appealing) banane ke liye
options.C: Dish ka vajan badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Garnish, jaise dhaniya patti ya cream, ka istemal dish ko sundar aur aakarshak banane ke liye kiya jaata hai, jisse 'aankhon se khana' wali baat sach hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek 100 logo ke buffet ke liye paneer tikka (appetizer) ka andazan kitna portion per person rakhna chahiye?

options.B: 2-3 pieces per person

questions.explanation: Aam taur par, buffet mein jahan kai appetizers hote hain, wahan per person 2-3 pieces (lagbhag 60-80 grams) ka anumaan rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Cycle Menu kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek menu jo roz badalta hai
options.B: Ek menu jo ek nishchit samay (jaise ek hafta ya mahina) ke baad repeat hota hai
options.C: Ek menu jo sirf gol-gol cheezein serve karta hai
options.D: Ek menu jo bahut mehenga hota hai

questions.explanation: Cycle Menu aksar institutions jaise hospitals ya hostels mein istemal hota hai, jahan menu ek set period (e.g., weekly) ke baad repeat hota hai, jisse planning aasan ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Food production ke dauran 'Mise en place' ka kya arth hai?

options.A: Sabse achhi plate mein khana lagana
options.B: Khana pakane se pehle saari samagri taiyaar aur organize karke rakhna

questions.explanation: 'Mise en place' ek French term hai jiska matlab hai 'sab kuch apni jagah par'. Iska matlab hai ki cooking shuru karne se pehle saari samagri (kati sabziyan, masale) taiyaar kar li jaaye.

questions.question: Buffet mein food ko aakarshak dikhane ke liye kya istemal kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Chafing dishes, risers, aur aachi lighting
options.B: Plastic ke bartan
options.D: Sab khana ek saath mix kar dena

questions.explanation: Buffet presentation ko behtar banane ke liye chafing dishes (khana garam rakhne ke liye), risers (dishes ko alag-alag height dene ke liye) aur aachi lighting ka prayog kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'live counter' (jaise pasta ya jalebi) ka event mein kya fayda hai?

options.B: Isse guests ke liye ek interactive aur fresh food experience banta hai

questions.explanation: Live counters guests ko manoranjan aur taaza bana hua khana pradaan karte hain, jo event ke anubhav ko aur bhi yaadgaar bana deta hai.

questions.question: Continental cuisine mein 'entrée' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Starter

questions.explanation: European dining mein, 'entrée' mukhya bhojan yaani Main Course ko kaha jaata hai. Jabki American English mein yeh aksar starter ke liye istemal hota hai, par traditional context mein yeh Main Course hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko 500 logo ke liye biryani banani hai, to aapko raw rice ka andaza kaise lagana chahiye?

options.B: 10 kg chawal
options.C: Per person 100-120 grams raw rice ke hisaab se
options.D: Per person 1 kg raw rice ke hisaab se

questions.explanation: Ek standard anumaan ke anusaar, jab biryani main course ka hissa ho, to prati vyakti 100-120 gram kachhe chawal ka upyog kiya jaata hai. 500 logo ke liye yeh lagbhag 50-60 kg hoga.

questions.question: Food trial ke dauran, client se kis tarah ka feedback lena sabse upyogi hai?

options.B: Taste, presentation, texture, aur portion size par specific feedback maangna
options.C: Price kam karne ke liye poochna

questions.explanation: Specific feedback, jaise namak theek hai ya nahi, dish dikhne mein kaisi hai, aur matra kitni hai, aadi par jaankari lena menu ko behtar banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Welcome drink ke liye kaun sa option garmiyon ke event ke liye sabse aacha hai?

options.B: Aam Panna ya Jaljeera

questions.explanation: Garmiyon mein refreshing aur thande drinks jaise Aam Panna ya Jaljeera guests ko taazgi dete hain aur unka swagat karne ke liye ek uttam vikalp hain.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye kitchen mein kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sab kuch ek hi chopping board par kaatna
options.B: Kachhe meat aur paki sabziyon ke liye alag-alag chopping boards aur knives ka istemal karna
options.D: Sab khana ek saath store karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination (ek food item se doosre mein germs failna) rokne ke liye kachhe aur pake hue bhojan ke liye alag-alag bartan aur cutting boards ka istemal karna anivarya hai.

questions.question: Agar menu mein ek dish client ko pasand nahi aayi lekin aapke chef ki specialty hai, to aap kya karenge?

options.A: Client ko convince karne ki koshish karenge
options.B: Chef ki baat na sunkar client ki pasand ko prathmikta denge
options.C: Client ki pasand ke anusaar dish mein badlav karenge ya uski jagah doosra option denge

questions.explanation: Catering business client satisfaction par chalta hai. Isliye, client ke feedback ko mahatva dena aur unki pasand ke anusaar vikalp prastut karna sahi kadam hai.

questions.question: Fusion cuisine ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Do alag-alag deshon ke khane ko milakar ek nayi dish banana
options.B: Bahut zyada confuse karne wala khana

questions.explanation: Fusion cuisine mein do ya do se adhik alag-alag culinary traditions (jaise Indian aur Italian) ke tatvon ko milakar ek anokhi aur nayi dish banayi jaati hai, jaise 'Paneer Tikka Pizza'.

questions.question: Off-site catering ke liye food transport karte samay sabse zaroori kya hai?

options.B: Khane ka temperature maintain karna (garam khane ko garam, thande ko thanda)

questions.explanation: Food safety ke liye sabse zaroori hai ki khane ko sahi taapman par transport kiya jaaye. Iske liye insulated containers ka istemal hota hai taaki khana kharab na ho.

questions.question: Buffet layout plan karte samay, plates kahan rakhni chahiye?

options.B: Line ke aakhir mein

questions.explanation: Buffet line ki shuruaat mein plates rakhni chahiye taaki guests plate uthakar aage badh sakein aur aasani se khana le sakein.

questions.question: Ek event ke liye crockery, cutlery, aur glassware ki quantity ka anuman kaise lagaya jaata hai?

options.A: Jitne guests hain, utni hi items
options.B: Guest count se 1.5 guna zyada

questions.explanation: Aam taur par, guest count se thoda zyada (lagbhag 1.5 guna) crockery/cutlery rakhi jaati hai taaki agar koi cheez gandi ho jaaye ya guest doobara le, to kami na pade.

questions.question: Event ke dauran 'back-of-house' (BOH) area kise kehte hain?

options.B: Kitchen, storage, aur staff area jahan guests nahi jaate

questions.explanation: BOH woh area hota hai jo guests ki nazron se door hota hai, jaise kitchen, dishwashing area, aur staff room, jahan event ka saara preparation aur operational kaam hota hai.

questions.question: Chafing dish ka mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Khane ko buffet mein garam rakhna

questions.explanation: Chafing dish ek metal pan hota hai jiske neeche burning fuel ya electric heater laga hota hai, jiska kaam buffet ke dauran khane ko garam aur taaza rakhna hai.

questions.question: Agar event venue par paani ki suvidha nahi hai, to caterer ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Paani ke bade tankers ya storage tanks ka intezaam karna chahiye
options.C: Guests ko apna paani laane ko kehna chahiye
options.D: Bina paani ke kaam chalana chahiye

questions.explanation: Paani catering operations ke liye bahut zaroori hai (cooking, cleaning). Agar venue par suvidha nahi hai, to caterer ko pehle se hi paani ke tankers ka prabandh karna chahiye.

questions.question: Event ke baad bache hue khane ka sabse aacha tarika kya hai?

options.B: Agar khana surakshit aur khane layak hai, to use kisi NGO ya food bank ko donate karna
options.C: Staff ko ghar le jaane dena

questions.explanation: Food wastage ko kam karne aur samajik zimmedari nibhane ka sabse aacha tarika hai ki bache hue surakshit khane ko zarooratmand logon tak pahunchaya jaaye.

questions.question: Ek 200 logo ke event ke liye buffet setup mein kam se kam kitni service lines honi chahiye taaki bheed na lage?

options.B: Do lines (double-sided buffet)

questions.explanation: Ek general rule ke anusaar, har 100 guests ke liye ek service line honi chahiye. 200 logo ke liye ek double-sided buffet table lagana aacha vikalp hai jisse bheed kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Event logistics mein 'load-in' aur 'load-out' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Saman (equipment, food) ko venue par laana (load-in) aur event ke baad wapas le jaana (load-out)

questions.explanation: Yeh technical terms hain. 'Load-in' ka matlab hai event se pehle saara saman venue par set karna, aur 'Load-out' ka matlab hai event ke baad sab kuch samet kar wapas le jaana.

questions.question: Round table setup mein, per guest kitni space ideal maani jaati hai?

options.B: 24-30 inches

questions.explanation: Ek aaramdayak dining experience ke liye, har guest ko table par kam se kam 24-30 inches (2-2.5 feet) ki jagah milni chahiye.

questions.question: Outdoor event mein keede-makodon (insects) se khane ko bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Khane par dawai chhidak deni chahiye
options.C: Food covers, mesh lids, aur insect repellent fans ka istemal karna chahiye
options.D: Event raat mein nahi karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Khane ki suraksha ke liye use dhak kar rakhna zaroori hai. Food covers aur mesh lids ka istemal karke keede-makodon ko door rakha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar event ke dauran serving spoon gir jaaye to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usi ko uthakar wapas rakh dena
options.B: Use saaf kapde se ponch kar wapas rakh dena
options.C: Use turant hata kar, saaf dhula hua doosra spoon rakhna
options.D: Guest ko haath se lene ko kehna

questions.explanation: Hygiene banaye rakhne ke liye, gire hue bartan ko turant replace karna chahiye. Use back-of-house mein dhulne ke liye bhejna chahiye.

questions.question: Inventory management ka catering business mein kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Isse stock (crockery, linen, ingredients) ka sahi hisaab rehta hai aur chori ya ghumne se bachav hota hai

questions.explanation: Sahi inventory management se aapko pata rehta hai ki aapke paas kitna saman hai, kya kharidna hai, aur isse saman ka nuksan ya chori hone ka khatra kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek catering company ke liye kaun sa equipment sabse zaroori nivesh (investment) hai?

options.B: DJ system
options.C: Reliable transportation vehicle aur food-grade insulated containers

questions.explanation: Off-site catering ke liye, khane ko surakshit roop se transport karna sabse zaroori kaam hai. Iske liye ek bharosemand gaadi aur insulated boxes anivarya hain.

questions.question: Buffet table par dishes ko kis sequence mein lagana chahiye?

options.A: Pehle dessert, fir main course, fir starters
options.B: Pehle plates, fir salads/starters, fir main course, aur aakhir mein dessert
options.C: Jaise man kare waise laga do

questions.explanation: Ek logical flow hona chahiye. Guest pehle plate lega, fir thande items jaise salad, fir garam main course aur ant mein meetha lega.

questions.question: Portable hand wash station lagana kis tarah ke event ke liye zaroori hai?

options.B: Sirf indoor events ke liye
options.C: Outdoor events jahan permanent washing facility na ho

questions.explanation: Khaas taur par outdoor events jaise mela ya farm party mein, jahan aam taur par haath dhone ki suvidha nahi hoti, wahan staff aur guests ke liye portable hand wash stations lagana hygiene ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Event ke liye kitne dustbins ki zaroorat padegi, iska anuman kis aadhar par lagaya jaata hai?

options.B: Guest count, menu type (disposables ka istemal), aur venue size ke aadhar par

questions.explanation: Dustbins ki sankhya kai cheezon par nirbhar karti hai: kitne log aayenge, kya disposable plates istemal ho rahi hain (jisse zyada kachra hoga), aur venue kitna bada hai.

questions.question: Event se pehle staff briefing (pre-meal meeting) ka kya uddeshya hota hai?

options.B: Sabko unke roles, menu details, aur event schedule ke baare mein jaankari dena

questions.explanation: Staff briefing ka mukhya uddeshya yeh sunishchit karna hai ki har staff member ko event ke baare mein poori jaankari ho, taaki sabhi log ek team ki tarah kaam kar sakein.

questions.question: American Service style kya hota hai?

options.A: Khana kitchen mein plate par lagakar guest ke saamne serve kiya jaata hai
options.B: Guest khud buffet se khana leta hai
options.C: Server badi platter se guest ki plate mein khana daalta hai
options.D: Khana table par rakh diya jaata hai aur guests khud serve karte hain

questions.explanation: American Service, ya 'Plated Service', mein chef kitchen mein hi har plate ko aakarshak dhang se sajata hai aur server us taiyaar plate ko seedhe guest ko serve karta hai.

questions.question: Ek server ke liye sabse zaroori personal grooming standard kya hai?

options.B: Saaf uniform, saaf baal aur naakhun, aur aachi personal hygiene

questions.explanation: Food service industry mein, saaf-suthra dikhna bahut zaroori hai. Ek saaf uniform aur aachi personal hygiene professional image banati hai aur food safety bhi sunishchit karti hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest server se rudely baat kare, to server ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Guest ko ignore karna chahiye
options.C: Shaant rehkar, politely guest ki baat sunni chahiye aur apne manager ko inform karna chahiye
options.D: Usi tarah se jawab dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Professionalism banaye rakhne ke liye, server ko shaant rehna chahiye aur guest ki samasya ko samajhne ki koshish karni chahiye. Agar mamla gambhir hai, to turant manager ko bulana chahiye.

questions.question: Ek event mein per kitne guests par ek server ka anupat (ratio) aam taur par aacha maana jaata hai (buffet service ke liye)?

options.B: 1 server per 100 guests

questions.explanation: Buffet service ke liye, 1 server 25-30 guests ko aaram se manage kar sakta hai, jisme plates clear karna, water service, aur buffet ko maintain karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Service ke dauran, plates ko guest ke kis side se clear karna chahiye?

options.B: Right side se
options.C: Guest ke sar ke upar se

questions.explanation: Traditional service etiquette ke anusaar, khana left side se serve kiya jaata hai (serve from the left) aur plates right side se clear ki jaati hain (clear from the right).

questions.question: Event ke dauran agar achanak staff ki kami ho jaaye to manager ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Maujood staff ke beech kaam ko re-assign karna aur aavashyakta anusaar multi-tasking karna
options.D: Guests ko kaam karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Ek aache manager ko aisi situation mein aaram se kaam lena chahiye aur maujood resources ka behtareen istemal karna chahiye, jaise ki staff ke roles ko aapas mein baantna.

questions.question: Russian Service style ki kya pehchan hai?

options.A: Khana kitchen mein plate par lagta hai
options.B: Server ek badi platter se khana lekar aata hai aur guest ki plate mein serve karta hai
options.C: Guest khud buffet se khana leta hai
options.D: Sab khana ek saath table par rakh diya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Russian Service mein, khana aakarshak dhang se badi platters par sajaya jaata hai. Server is platter ko guest ke paas le jaata hai aur fir unki plate mein khana parosta hai.

questions.question: Ek bartender ke paas kaun si skill honi sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Drinks ki aachi knowledge, speed, aur customer service skills

questions.explanation: Ek aache bartender ko various drinks ki recipes pata honi chahiye, use tezi se drinks banane aane chahiye, aur guests ke saath aacha vyavahar karna aana chahiye.

questions.question: 'Upselling' ka service mein kya matlab hai?

options.A: Guest ko sabse sasti cheez bechna
options.B: Guest ko ek behtar ya mehenga option suggest karna (jaise normal drink ki jagah premium drink)

questions.explanation: Upselling ek sales technique hai jisme server guest ko unke original choice se thoda behtar ya premium product lene ke liye prerit karta hai, jisse revenue badhta hai.

questions.question: Catering staff ke liye team work kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Isse event smooth chalta hai aur guest experience behtar hota hai
options.D: Isse aapas mein ladai hoti hai

questions.explanation: Jab kitchen staff, service staff, aur managers ek team ki tarah milkar kaam karte hain, to event bina kisi pareshani ke sampann hota hai aur guests ko aachi service milti hai.

questions.question: Event ke dauran agar koi glass toot jaaye to sabse pehla kaam kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Us area ko turant cordon off karna (gherna) aur saavdhani se kaanch saaf karna

questions.explanation: Safety sabse pehle aati hai. Toote hue kaanch ke area ko turant gher lena chahiye taaki kisi ko chot na lage, aur fir use saavdhanipoorvak saaf karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek event manager ka sabse important role kya hota hai on the day of the event?

options.B: Guests ke saath party karna
options.C: Sabhi departments (kitchen, service, logistics) ke beech co-ordinate karna aur problems solve karna

questions.explanation: Event ke din, manager ka mukhya kaam sabhi teams ke beech samnvay sthapit karna, yeh sunishchit karna ki sab kuch plan ke mutabik ho raha hai, aur aane wali kisi bhi samasya ka turant samadhan karna.

questions.question: French Service aur Russian Service mein mukhya antar kya hai?

options.A: French service mein khana guest ke saamne taiyaar (gueridon service) kiya jaata hai
options.B: Russian service zyada tez hoti hai
options.D: French service mein sirf French khana hota hai

questions.explanation: French service ka ek pramukh hissa 'gueridon service' hai, jahan chef ya senior server ek trolley par guest ke table ke paas hi khana taiyaar ya finish karta hai. Russian service mein taiyaar khana platter se serve hota hai.

questions.question: Staff ko motivate karne ke liye event ke baad kya karna ek aachi practice hai?

options.B: Unke aache kaam ki sarahna karna aur shayad ek chota incentive dena

questions.explanation: Team ka manobal badhane ke liye, unke aache pradarshan ki taarif karna aur unhe protsahit karna bahut zaroori hai. Isse woh aage bhi aacha kaam karne ke liye prerit hote hain.

questions.question: Wine serve karne ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.A: Bottle ko guest ko dikhana, fir kholna aur thoda sa taste karakar serve karna
options.B: Bina dikhaye glass mein daal dena
options.D: Glass ko poora upar tak bhar dena

questions.explanation: Sahi wine service etiquette mein pehle host ko bottle dikhayi jaati hai, fir unki anumati se kholkar thoda sa taste karaya jaata hai, aur fir baaki guests ko serve kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar do staff members aapas mein event ke dauran jhagda kar rahe hon, to manager ka immediate action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Dono ko turant guest area se door le jaakar shaanti se mamla suljhana
options.D: Dono ko kaam se nikaal dena

questions.explanation: Professional mahaul banaye rakhne ke liye, kisi bhi aantarik vivad ko guests se door, private mein suljhana chahiye. Isse event par koi bura asar nahi padta.

questions.question: India mein food business ke liye kaun sa license lena anivarya hai?

options.B: FSSAI License

questions.explanation: FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) license har food business operator ke liye anivarya hai. Yeh sunishchit karta hai ki food quality aur safety standards ka palan ho raha hai.

questions.question: Food temperature 'Danger Zone' kya hai?

options.B: 100°C se upar

questions.explanation: 5°C se 60°C ke beech ka taapman 'Danger Zone' kehlata hai kyunki is range mein bacteria sabse tezi se badhte hain, jisse khana kharab ho sakta hai.

questions.question: HACCP ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Have A Cup of Coffee and Proceed
options.B: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points

questions.explanation: HACCP ek systematic approach hai food safety ke liye, jisme food production process mein potential hazards ko pehchana jaata hai aur unhe control karne ke liye critical points set kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Kitchen staff ke liye sabse zaroori personal hygiene practice kya hai?

options.B: Khana banane se pehle aur har kaam ke baad aache se haath dhona

questions.explanation: Haath dhona food-borne illness ko rokne ka sabse saral aur prabhavi tarika hai. Isse germs ek jagah se doosri jagah nahi failte.

questions.question: Event venue par fire safety ke liye kya hona zaroori hai?

options.B: Fire extinguishers aur clear emergency exits

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi aapat sthiti se nipatne ke liye, venue par fire extinguishers ka hona aur bahar nikalne ke raaste (emergency exits) saaf aur khule hona anivarya hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi guest ko food allergy (jaise peanut allergy) hai, to caterer ki kya zimmedari hai?

options.A: Guest ko khana na khane ko kehna
options.B: Allergens ke baare mein saaf jaankari dena aur cross-contamination se bachne ke liye vishesh saavdhani baratna
options.D: Sab khane mein peanuts daal dena

questions.explanation: Caterer ki yeh kanooni aur naitik zimmedari hai ki woh guests ko unke khane mein maujood allergens ki sahi jaankari de aur unke liye surakshit bhojan taiyaar karne ka prayaas kare.

questions.question: FIFO principle in food storage ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fast In, Fast Out

questions.explanation: FIFO (First In, First Out) ka matlab hai ki jo saman pehle store mein aaya hai, use pehle istemal karna chahiye. Isse purana stock kharab nahi hota aur wastage kam hota hai.

questions.question: Bade events ke liye, kaun sa permit/license aam taur par local authorities se lena padta hai?

options.B: Public gathering license, music license (if applicable), aur fire safety NOC

questions.explanation: Bade events aayojit karne ke liye sthaniya prashasan se kai tarah ki anumati leni padti hai, jaise ki bheed ikattha karne ka license, music bajane ka license, aur fire department se No Objection Certificate.

questions.question: Agar kitchen mein kaam karte waqt kisi staff ko chot lag jaaye, to immediate action kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Use kaam karte rehne ko kehna
options.B: Turant First Aid dena aur zaroorat padne par medical help bulana

questions.explanation: Staff ki suraksha prathmikta honi chahiye. Chot lagne par turant prathmik upchar (First Aid) dena aur chot ki gambhirta ke anusaar doctor ko bulana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Catering mein istemal hone wale gas cylinders ke aaspas kya saavdhani baratni chahiye?

options.B: Unhe hamesha letakar rakhna chahiye
options.C: Unhe ek well-ventilated area mein, seedha khada karke rakhna chahiye aur leakage check karte rehna chahiye

questions.explanation: Gas cylinders ko hamesha havadar jagah par seedha rakhna chahiye taaki unpar dabav na pade. Leakage ka niyamit roop se check karna bhi suraksha ke liye anivarya hai.

questions.question: Food-grade material se bane bartano ka istemal kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Kyunki woh saste hote hain
options.C: Kyunki woh khane ke saath react nahi karte aur use surakshit rakhte hain

questions.explanation: Food-grade material (jaise stainless steel 304) is tarah se banaye jaate hain ki woh khane ke saath koi haanikarak chemical reaction na karein, jisse bhojan upbhog ke liye surakshit rehta hai.

questions.question: Event ke dauran waste management ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.A: Saara kachra ek hi jagah ikattha karna
options.B: Geela kachra (food waste) aur sookha kachra (plastic, paper) ko alag-alag bins mein ikattha karna
options.C: Kachre ko venue ke kone mein chupa dena

questions.explanation: Sahi waste management ke liye kachre ko segregate karna (alag-alag karna) zaroori hai. Isse recycling aasan ho jaati hai aur paryavaran ko kam nuksan hota hai.

questions.question: Agar Health Inspector achanak aapke kitchen mein inspection ke liye aa jaaye, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unke saath sahyog karna aur unhe sabhi areas aur documents dikhana
options.C: Bahana banakar kitchen band kar dena

questions.explanation: Health Inspector ke saath hamesha sahyog karna chahiye. Yeh aapki transparency aur food safety ke prati commitment ko darshata hai. Unke dwara maangi gayi sabhi jaankari aur documents unhe pradan karne chahiye.

questions.question: Pest control (keet niyantran) catering kitchen mein kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Keede-makodon (cockroaches, rats) ko food contamination se rokne aur bimariyan failne se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Keede-makode apne saath kai tarah ki bimariyan laate hain aur khane ko dushit kar sakte hain. Isliye, niyamit pest control karwana food safety ke liye atyant mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Ek caterer ki legal liability (kanooni zimmedari) kya hai agar uske khane se log bimar pad jaayein?

options.B: Client par dosh daal dena
options.C: Caterer par jurmana lag sakta hai, license cancel ho sakta hai aur kanooni karavai ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Food poisoning ke mamle mein, caterer seedhe taur par zimmedar hota hai. Is laparwahi ke liye uspar bhaari jurmana, license ka radd hona aur Consumer Protection Act ke tehat kanooni karavai ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Thawing (frozen food ko pighlana) ka sabse surakshit tarika kya hai?

options.A: Kitchen counter par raat bhar chhod dena
options.B: Refrigerator ke andar pighlana

questions.explanation: Frozen food ko refrigerator mein pighlana sabse surakshit tarika hai kyunki isse food item danger zone temperature (5°C-60°C) mein nahi aata, jisse bacteria growth ruk jaati hai.

questions.question: Staff ko food safety ki training dena kiski zimmedari hai?

options.B: Catering business ke owner/manager ki

questions.explanation: Yeh business owner ya manager ki zimmedari hai ki woh apne sabhi staff members ko food handling aur safety practices ki uchit training de taaki FSSAI ke niyamo ka palan ho sake.

questions.question: Ek dish ki 'Food Cost' kaise calculate ki jaati hai?

options.B: Us dish ko banane mein lagi saari samagri (ingredients) ki kul laagat

questions.explanation: Food cost ka matlab hai ek particular dish ko banane mein istemal hui sabhi samagriyon ki kul laagat (total cost of all ingredients).

questions.question: Ek client ko quotation dete samay, usmein kya-kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Per-person price, detailed menu, taxes, service charges, aur anya extra costs ka poora breakdown

questions.explanation: Ek professional quotation mein poori transparency honi chahiye. Ismein har cheez ka saaf-saaf breakdown hona chahiye taaki client ko pata chale ki woh kis cheez ke liye pay kar raha hai.

questions.question: Catering business mein 'Overhead Costs' kya hote hain?

options.B: Woh kharche jo seedhe taur par kisi ek event se nahi jude hote, jaise kitchen ka rent, staff ki salary, marketing

questions.explanation: Overhead costs woh indirect kharche hain jo business ko chalane ke liye zaroori hote hain, chahe aap koi event kar rahe hon ya nahi, jaise rent, bijli ka bill, salary aadi.

questions.question: Agar ek plate ka food cost Rs. 200 hai aur aap 30% food cost percentage maintain karna chahte hain, to selling price kya hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Formula: Selling Price = Food Cost / Food Cost Percentage. Is case mein, Selling Price = 200 / 0.30 = Rs. 666.67, yaani lagbhag Rs. 667.

questions.question: Ek naye catering business ko promote karne ka sabse cost-effective tarika kya hai?

options.B: Social media marketing (Instagram, Facebook) aur word-of-mouth

questions.explanation: Naye business ke liye, social media ek sasta aur prabhavi madhyam hai jahan aap apne kaam ki photos daal kar logon tak pahunch sakte hain. Aache kaam se word-of-mouth publicity bhi milti hai.

questions.question: Vendor management ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf sabzi wale se baat karna
options.B: Apne sabhi suppliers (jaise raw material supplier, tent wala, florist) ke saath aache sambandh banana aur unse aachi deals lena

questions.explanation: Vendor management mein apne suppliers ke saath aache professional rishte banaye rakhna, unse sahi daam par quality product lena aur samay par payment karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Contract mein 'Force Majeure' clause ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Ek aisa clause jo unexpected ghatnaon (jaise prakritik aapda, sarkaari lockdown) ke case mein dono parties ko unki zimmedariyon se mukt karta hai
options.C: Extra force ke liye extra charge

questions.explanation: 'Force Majeure' ya 'Act of God' clause contract mein isliye daala jaata hai taaki agar koi aisi ghatna ho jaaye jispar kisi ka control na ho (jaise-baadh, mahamari), to contract ko bina penalty ke cancel ya postpone kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Break-Even Point kya hota hai?

options.A: Jab aapko bahut zyada profit ho
options.B: Jab aapko bahut zyada loss ho
options.C: Woh point jahan aapka total revenue, total cost ke barabar ho (na profit, na loss)

questions.explanation: Break-Even Point business ka woh level of sales hai jahan par kul aay (revenue) aur kul laagat (cost) barabar ho jaate hain. Iske baad ki gayi har sale se profit hota hai.

questions.question: Client se advance payment lena kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Event ki booking confirm karne aur shuruaati kharche (jaise raw material kharidna) poore karne ke liye
options.D: Client ko pareshan karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Advance payment se client ki booking confirm hoti hai aur caterer ko event ki taiyari shuru karne ke liye working capital mil jaata hai. Yeh dono parties ke liye ek commitment hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka competitor aapse bahut kam price offer kar raha hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apna price usse bhi kam kar dena
options.B: Business band kar dena
options.C: Apni behtar quality, service, aur value par focus karna aur client ko samjhana ki sasta hamesha aacha nahi hota

questions.explanation: Price war mein ulajhne ki bajaye, apni strengths jaise behtar khana, professional service, aur aacha anubhav par focus karna chahiye. Quality ke liye thoda zyada pay karne wale clients hamesha hote hain.

questions.question: Ek catering business ke liye 'USP' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Unique Selling Proposition

questions.explanation: USP (Unique Selling Proposition) woh khaas cheez hai jo aapko aapke competitors se alag banati hai. Yeh aapki koi special dish, exceptional service, ya koi unique theme ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Profitability badhane ke liye, caterer ko kis cheez par sabse zyada dhyan dena chahiye?

options.B: Food cost aur wastage ko control karne par
options.C: Staff ki salary kam karne par

questions.explanation: Catering business mein profit margin seedhe taur par food cost aur wastage se juda hota hai. In dono cheezon par aacha control karke profitability ko kaafi had tak badhaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek event ke liye 100 logo ki booking thi lekin 120 log aa gaye, to is situation ko handle karne ke liye contract mein kaun sa clause hona chahiye?

options.B: Clause stating charges for extra guests (at a higher per-person rate)

questions.explanation: Contract mein pehle se hi yeh saaf likha hona chahiye ki agar guest count badhta hai, to extra guests ke liye per-person kya charge lagega. Aam taur par yeh rate normal rate se thoda zyada hota hai.

questions.question: Apne catering business ke liye ek strong brand identity banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Ek professional logo, consistent quality, aachi customer service, aur positive client feedback

questions.explanation: Ek strong brand sirf naam se nahi banta. Uske liye ek pehchan (logo), har baar ek jaisi aachi quality, behtareen service, aur khush clients ka vishwas zaroori hai.
